title: Skills plus MCP Integration and 2026 Evolution · Extension Lens: Workflow Orchestration
summary: Ship a skill-driven MCP workflow across Codex and Claude with migration controls. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext workflow orchestration increment in a production skill and MCP integration package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use a skill to define the workflow while MCP provides narrow live capabilities.
Patch, rotate, revoke, audit, rate-limit, and incident-test MCP deployments.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
